summary: Added Mariano Neme (testimony 6) to the testimonials carousel on the Astro static site.
Note: The spec file was not pre-created by the feature planner — it was created by the implementor as part of this task since no spec existed at the expected path.

Phase 1 (i18n): Added `testimonials.6.name`, `testimonials.6.location`, and `testimonials.6.text` keys to all three language files: `src/i18n/es.ts` (Spanish original), `src/i18n/en.ts` (English translation), and `src/i18n/zh.ts` (Chinese translation).

Phase 2 (Component): Appended testimony 6 object to the `testimonials[]` array in `src/components/Testimonials.astro` with initials 'MN' (no photo URL available), and i18n lookups for name/location/text.
Phase 3 (Integration): No additional wiring needed — carousel dots and navigation auto-scale from array length; TestimonialCard.astro already renders initials fallback when photo is undefined.
Phase 4 (Validation): `npm run build` completed successfully — 7 pages built with 0 errors.

validation.build: PASSED — 7 pages built in 4.47s, no errors
validation.typescript: PASSED — Astro build includes TypeScript compilation, 0 errors
